scripts.import:jetlag: node --experimental-strip-types packages/content-import/src/cli.ts import --input "./Jet Lag The Game.xlsx" --output "./samples/generated/jet-lag-the-game.content-pack.json" --report "./samples/generated/jet-lag-the-game.import-report.json"
scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/importer/*.test.ts tests/geo/*.test.ts tests/engine/*.test.ts tests/transport/*.test.ts apps/mobile/tests/*.test.ts
